name: USCIS Case Status Response
description: The structure of a USCIS Case Status API response for an immigration case lookup by receipt number

fields.name: formType
fields.description: USCIS form type (e.g., I-485, I-130, I-765, N-400)

fields.name: submittedDate
fields.description: Date the application was submitted to USCIS

fields.name: modifiedDate
fields.description: Date the case status was most recently modified

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current case status label in English

fields.name: description
fields.description: Detailed English description of the current case status

fields.name: statusEsDesc
fields.description: Detailed Spanish description of the current case status

fields.name: historicalCaseStatuses
fields.description: Historical timeline of case status events

fields.name: status
fields.description: Status label for this historical event

fields.name: description
fields.description: English description of this historical event

fields.name: descriptionEsDesc
fields.description: Spanish description of this historical event
